message:
refactor(bench): fix TUI benchmark compilation without ftui feature

The TUI benchmark previously used #![cfg(feature = "ftui")] as a
crate-level attribute, which doesn't work for criterion benchmark
binaries since they still need a main() function. Refactor to:

- Replace crate-level cfg with per-item #[cfg(feature = "ftui")] on
  each use statement and mod declaration
- Wrap all benchmark code in #[cfg(feature = "ftui")] mod enabled
- Add #[cfg(not(feature = "ftui"))] fn main() {} fallback
- Update type references to ftui-native names (AppConfig -> FtuiAppConfig,
  View -> FtuiView)

Also update tui/mod.rs to re-export FtuiAppConfig, FtuiView,
FtuiViewState, WaModel, WaMsg as canonical names under the ftui
feature gate, available in both rollout and non-rollout builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
